column19: Propensity score can be calculated differently for engaged and greenfield customers. Greenfield customers should not have past engagement history taken into account when determining their propensity score as they would always have less past engagement as compared to engaged customers. This would skew the propensity score against greenfield customers, always putting them at a lower score compared to engaged accounts. Recommend to have different calculation for propensity score while keeping to only 1 propensity score for every account, so as to reduce clutter and confusion.
